# Support

Need help with a Micrasolutions product? Here's the fastest path.

## Self-serve first
- **Documentation:** https://micrasolutions.com/docs/
- **FAQ:** on each product page and in the docs
- **Changelog:** https://micrasolutions.com/changelog/

## Ask the community
- **GitHub Discussions** — questions, ideas, show-and-tell
- **GitHub Issues** — bugs and feature requests (use the templates)

## Paid support
Pro, Business, and Cloud plans include email support. See
https://micrasolutions.com/pricing/.

## Response expectations
- Community channels: best-effort, usually within a few days.
- Paid support: per your plan's SLA.

Please don't email maintainers directly for support — public issues and discussions help
everyone who hits the same thing.
